summary: Today’s Azure news was led by AI developer tooling, cloud security, and platform reliability updates: Azure highlighted a GitHub Copilot Agent usage dashboard, Claude Code integration via Microsoft Foundry in VS Code, and the Azure Copilot Observability Agent Chat for querying observability data conversationally, alongside GitHub updates to Copilot billing/plans and automatic evaluation models for individual plans. On the infrastructure and security side, Microsoft announced Kubernetes Center insights for security and LTS/out-of-support version tracking, GA support in Azure Functions for Node.js 24, GA of Microsoft Defender for open source relational databases on AWS RDS, May 2026 updates for Microsoft Sentinel, and a deep dive into Azure Container Registry regional endpoints emphasizing deterministic, resilient multi-region registry design; developers also got Aspire 13.4 as the latest app development framework release.
